steps.title: Identify the needed pronoun
steps.content: The sentence refers to the epic poem The Poem of the Cid and then describes the poem’s compelling narrative. The blank needs a singular possessive pronoun meaning “belonging to it.”

steps.title: Eliminate pronoun errors
steps.content: Choice A, “they’re,” means “they are,” not possessive. Choice C, “their,” is plural possessive and does not match the singular poem. Choice D, “it’s,” means “it is,” not possessive. The singular possessive pronoun fits. The answer is B.
